one_time_description: Forgiveness of $5,362,501 in comprehensive land claim negotiation loan debt by Canada (Indigenous Services Canada)
economic_notes: Nation holds equity interests in A-Tlegay Fisheries Limited Partnership (fishing licences/quota/vessels), Nanwakolas Forestry LP and Nanwakolas Timber LP (timber harvesting), Nanwakolas Carbon Credit LP and Nanwakolas Offset LP (carbon credits), and Knight Inlet Grizzly Tours Ltd. (grizzly bear ecotourism). COVID-19 noted as likely to have material negative impact on GBEs in fiscal 2021. IR#1 and IR#2 subdivision expansion projects underway.
notes: Large one-time item: $5,362,501 ISC loan forgiveness of comprehensive land claim negotiation debt recorded below the operating surplus line, bringing total annual surplus to $9,599,740. Six GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (not consolidated). Loans receivable of $12,563,769 are primarily advances to related entities (KFN Business Trust, KFN EDC LP) with no specific repayment terms. Trust Funds Held by Federal Government ($80,843) are held under the Indian Act. Province of BC ($476,283) and BC Treaty Commission ($775,780) included in total government transfers estimate. No schedule of remuneration provided. No population data disclosed.
